_usage: Edit these values to configure your transcription settings. Command-line arguments will override these defaults.

audio._backend_comment: Audio capture backend: 'ffmpeg' (recommended, more reliable) or 'pyaudio' (legacy, may hang on some systems)
audio._default_microphone_comment: Audio device name. Linux/ffmpeg: 'default', 'plughw:0,0', 'plughw:1,0', etc. macOS/avfoundation: ':0', ':1', or device name.
audio._phrase_timeout_comment: Seconds of silence before considering it a new phrase. Higher = fewer false phrase breaks, Lower = more responsive to pauses
audio._same_output_threshold_comment: Number of repeated outputs before text is finalized. Lower = faster finalization (3-5), Higher = more stable but slower (10-15). Default: 7
audio._fuzzy_duplicate_threshold_comment: Similarity threshold (0.0-1.0) for detecting duplicate sentences in live transcription. Higher = stricter matching. Default: 0.85
audio._min_words_comment: Minimum word count to save a segment. 0 = save all segments, 5 = skip short fragments. Default: 0

database._path_comment: Custom database base path. Empty = use default (_AUTOMATIC_BACKUP). Can be absolute or relative path.
database._path_format_comment: Python strftime format for database subdirectories. Default: %Y/%m (2025/01)
database._filename_format_comment: Python strftime format for database filenames. MUST include time (%H%M%S) for unique databases per session. Default: %Y-%m-%d_%H%M%S (2025-01-08_143527). Use %Y-%m-%d_%H for hourly databases.
database._filename_prefix_comment: Optional custom prefix for database files. Empty = default 'Transcriptions'. Example: 'Meeting' creates '{format}_Meeting.db'
database._max_entries_comment: Number of recent transcriptions to send to web UI. Lower = faster, Higher = more history shown

web_server._host_comment: Server host. 0.0.0.0 = accessible from network, 127.0.0.1 = localhost only
web_server._port_comment: Server port. Port 80 requires admin/root privileges. Use 8080 for non-privileged access
web_server._update_interval_comment: Seconds between web UI updates. Lower = more responsive, Higher = less network traffic
web_server._settings_ip_whitelist_comment: IP addresses or CIDR ranges allowed to access settings. Empty array = allow all. Example: ['127.0.0.1', '192.168.1.0/24']

password_auth._enabled_comment: Enable password authentication as fallback for non-whitelisted IPs
password_auth._password_comment: Password for temporary access. Empty = generate random password on startup and display in console
password_auth._session_timeout_comment: How long password-authenticated sessions remain valid (in minutes)

audio_backup._wav_enabled_comment: Save final session audio as .wav file (created when transcription stops)
audio_backup._ts_enabled_comment: Save continuous MPEG-TS backup (power-fail safe, created during recording)
audio_backup._base_directory_comment: Base directory for audio backups. Empty = use default (_AUTOMATIC_BACKUP). Can be absolute or relative path.
audio_backup._path_format_comment: Python strftime format for audio backup subdirectories. Default: %Y/%m (2025/01)
audio_backup._filename_format_comment: Python strftime format for audio filenames. Default: %Y-%m-%d_%H%M%S (2025-01-08_143527)
audio_backup._filename_prefix_comment: Optional custom prefix for audio files. Empty = no prefix. Example: 'Recording' creates '{format}_Recording.wav'
audio_backup._format_comment: Audio format for backups. WAV recommended to prevent file corruption

file_transcription._use_gpu_comment: Use GPU for file transcription if available
file_transcription._language_comment: Language code for transcription (auto, en, es, fr, de, etc.)

whisper_decoding._comment: Advanced Whisper decoding parameters. Only modify if you understand Whisper internals. Defaults are optimized for each use case.

live_transcription._beam_size_comment: Search breadth (1=greedy/fast, 5=thorough/slow). Default 1 for live reduces hallucinations.
live_transcription._best_of_comment: Number of sampling runs (1=single pass, higher=more options to choose from).
live_transcription._temperature_comment: Randomness (0.0=deterministic, higher=creative). Can be array like [0.0, 0.2, 0.4] for fallback.
live_transcription._condition_comment: Use previous text as context. False for live because short chunks lack context.
live_transcription._compression_ratio_threshold_comment: Reject transcriptions with too much repetition. Lower = stricter (rejects more), higher = permissive.
live_transcription._logprob_threshold_comment: Reject transcriptions with low confidence scores. Higher = stricter (rejects more).

file_transcription._beam_size_comment: Search breadth (1=greedy/fast, 5=thorough/slow). Default 5 for file prioritizes quality.
file_transcription._temperature_comment: Temperature fallback sequence. Tries deterministic first, then increases creativity if fails.
file_transcription._condition_comment: Use previous text as context. True for file because 30s chunks have context.

file_manager._hidden_items_comment: List of specific file/folder paths to hide in file manager. Paths are relative to the working directory. Example: ['templates', 'config.json', 'models/cached']

file_mover._move_on_transcription_stop_comment: Automatically move files when transcription stops
file_mover._destination_path_comment: Destination path for files (can be SMB path like //server/share/folder or local path)
file_mover._smb_username_comment: Username for SMB/network share authentication (leave empty for local paths)
file_mover._smb_password_comment: Password for SMB/network share authentication (stored in plain text - use with caution)
file_mover._smb_domain_comment: Domain for SMB authentication (optional, can be empty)
file_mover._source_patterns_comment: File patterns to move (glob patterns relative to working directory)
file_mover._delete_source_comment: Delete source file after successful move (false = copy instead)
file_mover._preserve_structure_comment: Preserve directory structure when moving files

hallucination_filter._enabled_comment: Filter out known Whisper hallucinations (phantom subtitles from training data)
hallucination_filter._phrases_comment: List of phrases to filter. Partial matches are detected (phrase in text or text in phrase)
hallucination_filter._cjk_filter_enabled_comment: Filter out hallucinated CJK characters when transcribing Latin-based languages

live_translation._enabled_comment: Enable real-time translation of live transcription
live_translation._translate_in_progress_comment: Also translate in-progress text (may cause flicker)
live_translation._use_gpu_comment: Use GPU for translation model. Disable to run NLLB on CPU and free VRAM for Whisper

generation_params._num_beams_comment: Number of beams for beam search (1-20). Higher = better quality but slower
generation_params._no_repeat_ngram_size_comment: Prevent repeating n-grams of this size (0 = disabled, 2-5 recommended)

live_translation._context_window_comment: Number of segments to combine for translation context (1 = no batching, 2-5 = better quality but slower)
live_translation._max_entries_to_send_comment: Number of recent translations to send to web UI. Lower = faster, Higher = more history shown
live_translation._trusted_clients_comment: IPs allowed to use this machine for remote translation (managed automatically via pairing)
